title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
